title: Arotome_fps
description: Suitable for relatively weak PCs with good, uncut graphics. Most of the content runs smoothly on the server
body:
Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and graphics enhancements.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796a78dcef4894e7df6aaaf6017464ce8579e3e4.png)

Performance
Optimized for weak PCs without cutting down o
Quiltn graphics. Powered by Sodium, Lithium and others. The stability of the world and FPS with beautiful graphics is ensured. Some mods have been adjusted for a more stable game.

Server
All content runs on the client, meaning you can play with friends or on other projects.

Uses latest version 0.26.4

Graphics

Beautiful graphics made using mods and texture packs. Player and creature animations have also been improved with visual effects. 

Include everything you need to replay mod

(P.S. if your textures are displayed incorrectly, change the texture packs)
